commit_message: feat: add antipattern search mode and shared project resolver
diff_summary: Refactored the search Edge Function to extract a shared parseStructuredResponse helper, reducing code duplication between error mode and the new antipattern mode. Moved project resolution into a shared resolve-project.ts utility that accepts either project_id or project_slug.
notes: This change improves maintainability by centralizing project slug resolution and structured JSON parsing. Previously each Edge Function independently validated project_id with no slug support.
